blended.narrative: Eldora is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 12 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,771 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 2.1" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Friday: overcast, highs of 44°F, winds around 21 mph.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 25".
